message:
perf(http1): eliminate String allocation in request encoder

Replace intermediate String + write!() with direct extend_from_slice
writes to BytesMut. Reuses append_decimal and append_chunk_size_line
from codec.rs (now pub(super)). Removes String allocation per request
encode and avoids fmt::Write overhead.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
